subject: Gaming
title: Xbox 360: Microsoft Strikes First
description: A quick, practical guide to Xbox 360: Microsoft Strikes First.

hook.text: Microsoft launched the Xbox 360 a full year before PS3. That head start changed the entire generation.

buildup.text: Xbox Live was now the best online service. Halo 3 and Gears of War defined online console gaming.

discovery.text: Achievement points gamified gaming itself. Players competed for scores across every game they owned.

twist.text: The Red Ring of Death killed millions of consoles. Microsoft spent $1 billion replacing them.

climax.text: Despite the hardware disaster, Xbox 360 sold 84 million units and dominated North America.

punchline.text: A billion-dollar hardware failure. They survived it and still won America.

quiz.question: What was the Red Ring of Death?
options: A widespread hardware failure that killed millions of Xbox 360 consoles
